title: LinkLayer: O(n) signature verification documented but not mitigated
description: In rust/lichen-link/src/link_layer.rs, the documentation now correctly notes that RX requires O(n) Schnorr verifications where n = peer count, since frames don't include sender IID. The Python link_layer.py also documents this. This is a known protocol limitation. Consider: (1) documenting the expected peer count ceiling in the spec, (2) adding sender IID hint as optional frame extension, or (3) tracking this as future protocol enhancement.
close_reason: Known protocol limitation documented - O(n) verification is acceptable for expected peer counts (<100)
